pdg_node.statement: (initial_state: Vector[float] (x0), initial_covariance: Matrix[float] (P0), transition_matrix: Matrix[float] (F), process_noise: Matrix[float] (Q), observation_matrix: Matrix[float] (H), measurement_noise: Matrix[float] (R)) -> StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}
pdg_node.informal_desc: Create the immutable Kalman state-space model with latent mean and covariance plus fixed system/noise matrices.

declaration.name: initializelineargaussianstatemodel
declaration.type_signature: (initial_state: Vector[float] (x0), initial_covariance: Matrix[float] (P0), transition_matrix: Matrix[float] (F), process_noise: Matrix[float] (Q), observation_matrix: Matrix[float] (H), measurement_noise: Matrix[float] (R)) -> StateModelSpec{x, P, F, Q, H, R}
declaration.docstring: Create the immutable Kalman state-space model with latent mean and covariance plus fixed system/noise matrices.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Immutable Linear-Gaussian Dynamical System Specification. Binds an initial latent mean vector and covariance matrix with linear evolution and linear projection operators, plus additive noise covariances, into a single formal model specification. The operation does not propagate or update state; it only maps raw numerical tensors into an immutable typed object that encodes first-order Markov and Gaussian assumptions for later recursive estimation.. Applications: Multisensor robot pose tracking with uncertain motion and observation channels, Neural time-series latent trajectory decoding from noisy electrode measurements, Geophysical data assimilation for evolving spatial fields with partial observations, Industrial process digital twins for hidden system-state monitoring and anomaly detection
